name: Guangzhou Baiyun Electric Equipment Co., Ltd.
summary: Guangzhou Baiyun Electric Equipment Co., Ltd. researches, develops, manufactures, and sells power transmission and distribution equipment in China and internationally. The company offers high and low voltage switchgear assemblies, high and low voltage components, power supply and automation equipment, prefabricated transformer substations, bus bar trunking, etc.; and GIS integrated electric equipment, DC traction equipment, and intelligent products. Its products are used in rail transit, grid, power generation, metallurgy of iron and steel, petroleum, paper, automotive, nuclear power, municipal facilities, building, and other fields. Guangzhou Baiyun Electric Equipment Co., Ltd. was founded in 1989 and is based in Guangzhou, China.
